Our Story

A botanical haven
in the heart of Vizag

Latté Café & Kitchen is Visakhapatnam's most distinctive dining destination — where living moss walls cascade through arched alcoves, floral murals bloom across white walls, and every seat offers a view into our green world.

Our menu spans continents — from hand-rolled sushi and steamed dimsums to wood-fired pizza, global bowls, and slow-poured specialty coffee. Every dish is crafted with intention, every cup poured with care.

🍣 Sushi & Oriental 🍕 Wood-fired Pizza ☕ Specialty Coffee 🌍 Global Bowls 🥟 Dim Sums 🌿 Botanical Ambience

What Guests Say

Stories from our tables

★★★★★

"Amazing ambience with a wide variety of menu of continental and oriental. Definitely the best sushi and dimsums in Visakhapatnam! And the pizzas are just out of the world. A must try place!"

Tejaswi, Visakhapatnam
TripAdvisor · Nov 2024
★★★★★

"The coffee quality is commendable — rich and flavorful. Staff is friendly and attentive. Parking is easy, making accessibility hassle-free. Great spot for a relaxed afternoon."

Verified Visitor
Restaurant Guru
★★★★☆

"A perfect café near the beach for a refreshing break. Loved the moss wall interiors — felt like dining inside a garden. Will definitely be back for the sushi and sizzlers!"

Google Review
Visakhapatnam
